title: bromus madritensis subsp. haussknechtii
intro: Bromus madritensis subsp. haussknechtii, also known as Spanish brome, is a perennial grass native to the Iberian Peninsula and parts of North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Bromus madritensis subsp. haussknechtii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its seeds can be used to make a nutritious and healthy oil for cooking and skincare.
